positive: A central, stylized silhouette of a nocturnal forest scene under a crescent moon. The main elements include a winding river, stylized abstract foliage (ferns, lilies), and three silhouetted deer drinking at the bank. The style should mimic a deep indigo and cream woodcut print, featuring intricate line work and high contrast. Composition must be highly symmetrical and vertically balanced. Focus on clean, thick outlines and negative space for excellent print readability. Use limited, natural color palette (deep blues, forest greens, earthy creams). Vector illustration aesthetic, suitable for t-shirt print, high detail, cinematic lighting.
